name: @rello-platform/webhook-events
description: Canonical Rello-emitted outbound webhook event-type registry (union + lifecycle metadata + runtime guard + legacy→canonical normalizer) for the Rello platform
comment:exports: Rello consumes this in a Next/CJS-interop context. The build stays single-format ESM ON PURPOSE; we expose the SAME ESM entry under `require`/`default` so a CJS consumer cannot crash with ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED. Node >=22.12 require(esm) loads it (no top-level await). Mirrors @rello-platform/signals v0.8.0.
